details.query: show details about items where sales >32
details.response:
Sql query:
 SELECT * FROM stock INNER JOIN sales ON stock.id = sales.id WHERE sales.QuantitySold >32 
 
 Result: 
 ~|id|item_name    |stock|SaleID|id|QuantitySold|SaleDate  |
|3 |monitor      |80   |9     |3 |70          |2025-02-20|
|2 |keyboard     |25   |24    |2 |53          |2025-01-03|
|1 |mouse        |50   |26    |1 |33          |2025-10-30|
|20|gaming laptop|15   |28    |20|90          |2024-05-05|
|21|camera       |10   |29    |21|70          |2025-02-12|
 ~
